mnemonics: Think of a CLOUD: Capacity, Load, Overhead, Utilization, Demand
keyPoints: Measure Utilization, not just raw usage
Forecast future Demand based on trends
Understand the difference between Load (incoming work) and Capacity (maximum throughput)
commonMistakes: Provisioning for peak load as the new baseline, leading to over-provisioning and high costs
Measuring performance in isolation without correlating it to resource utilization
